name: Plandek
description: Engineering metrics and delivery-intelligence platform with North-Star dashboards, cost-tracking and cycle-time analytics.

seo.title: Plandek — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Plandek: Engineering metrics and delivery-intelligence platform with North-Star dashboards, cost-tracking and cycle-time analytics.

when_to_use: Engineering delivery intelligence with North-Star KPIs
Cycle time and cost-of-delay tracking per team
Flow metrics aligned to SAFe and lean delivery practices

pros: North-Star dashboards aligned to business outcomes
Flexible integrations with Jira, Git, CI
cons: UI can feel overwhelming for new users
review.verdict: Capable engineering delivery intelligence, especially in EMEA, but feature sprawl can overwhelm new users.
review.best_for: EMEA enterprise engineering leaders tying delivery metrics to business outcomes.
review.not_for: Small teams wanting plug-and-play DORA dashboards.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
